home.heroSub: Istanbul's most elegant bespoke cake atelier. Let's design your dream cake together.
home.storyBody: Atelier Cake creates bespoke cakes where every detail is crafted with care. With premium ingredients, French patisserie techniques and boundless imagination, we immortalise your special moments.
home.instaSub: Get inspired by our recent work

about.title: About Us
about.lead: Istanbul's home of handmade luxury cakes
about.story: Atelier Cake was born from a passion that sees cake-making as an art. Every cake is a unique creation that tells our client's story.
about.founderBio: Trained at Le Cordon Bleu in Paris, Defne has over 15 years of experience and has made Atelier Cake Istanbul's most distinguished cake atelier.
about.value1Desc: Every cake is crafted one by one, by hand.
about.value3Desc: Entirely unique designs, just for you.

cookie.text: We use cookies to improve your experience. Your data is protected under KVKK.

date.tooSoon: Delivery must be at least 5 days from now

newsletter.title: News from the Atelier
newsletter.subtitle: Be the first to hear about new collections, seasonal flavours and private events.
newsletter.success: Thank you! You are subscribed to our newsletter.
newsletter.error: Something went wrong, please try again.

process.title: From Idea to Celebration
process.lead: In four steps, we bring your dream cake to your table.

ingredients.title: Only the Finest
ingredients.lead: At the heart of every recipe lie carefully selected premium ingredients.

seasonal.title: This Season's Favourites
seasonal.lead: Limited signature designs crafted with the freshest flavours of the season.

ctaBand.title: Ready to design your dream cake?

faqPage.subtitle: We're here for everything on your mind.
faqPage.stillLead: Our team would be delighted to help.

pricing.title: Packages & Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Bespoke solutions for every budget and every occasion.
pricing.customLead: Create a fully bespoke cake with our 3D configurator and see the price instantly.
pricing.note: All prices include VAT. The final price is determined by design details.

weddings.title: Wedding Cakes
weddings.heroLead: A timeless masterpiece worthy of the most special day of your life.
weddings.introTitle: Let Your Love Story Become Sugar
weddings.introBody: Every wedding cake is a unique creation that tells the couple's story. With one-to-one consultation, a tasting session and event-day setup, we deliver a flawless experience.

corporate.title: Corporate Cakes
corporate.heroLead: Professional cake solutions that add prestige to your brand.
corporate.introBody: Custom designs with your logo and corporate colours for launches, anniversaries, openings and special corporate events — with bulk-order and invoicing benefits.

journal.title: Journal
journal.subtitle: Inspiration, guides and stories from the world of cakes.

track.subtitle: Enter your order number to see its status instantly.

flavorsPage.title: Our Flavors
flavorsPage.subtitle: Discover our signature tastes, each carefully balanced.
flavorsPage.tasteLead: Experience our flavours with your loved ones as part of our Couture packages.
